title: NeuronZonePayload
description: Result of dispatching the Day-at-a-Glance orchestrator to one registered specialist head (F0038-S0002 zone-dispatch). A live head (Renewals) returns zone_status 'content' with an app-part component; stub heads (Tasks, Pipeline, Broker activity) return zone_status 'inactive' with no business data (F0038-S0004). This is assembly, not composition: a payload never reads or ranks another zone. The 'inactive' branch is the F0040 extension point that flips a stub to live. The head contract is intentionally thin and provisional (intake guardrail) — do not gold-plate.

zone_status.description: content = live head returned data; inactive = stub head (reads nothing, no CTA); empty = live head, nothing needs attention; error = head failed/timed out (slot-isolated, other zones still render).

component.description: Registered component identifier for the slot body (required when zone_status = content). Rendered via the component registry; never markup.

props.description: Validated props for the component (required when zone_status = content). For the Renewals zone this carries the needs-attention list items.

detail.description: Human-readable note for inactive ('not yet active'), empty ('nothing needs you in the next 90 days'), or error states.

then.description: Stub payload carries no component/props and no business data — a stub agrees with anything and does not validate the head API.
